# Copilot Project Instructions

## Tooling Preference
- Prefer direct workspace file tools for file discovery, reading, and editing.
- Use PowerShell/terminal commands only when direct file tools cannot complete the task.
- Avoid terminal-based file search when direct file search is sufficient.

## Interaction Style
- Reduce prompt interactions and clarification questions.
- Default to taking action directly when the request is clear.
- Keep progress updates short and less frequent unless the user requests detailed step-by-step updates.
- Keep responses concise and outcome-focused.
